# Glossary & Acronyms

## RHCSA

**Red Hat Certified System Administrator.** Red Hat's entry-level system
administration certification, earned by passing the EX200 performance-based
exam. The focus of this book.

## RHCE

**Red Hat Certified Engineer.** Red Hat's next certification beyond the RHCSA,
focused on automation with Ansible. Earned by passing the EX294 exam; requires
an active RHCSA as a prerequisite.

## RHLS

**Red Hat Learning Subscription.** Red Hat's annual training subscription,
bundling access to official courses, hands-on labs, and exam vouchers. Sold in
tiers (Single Course, Standard, Premium) at varying prices and lab-hour /
exam-attempt allowances.
